overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a coastal amusement park area during golden hour. The player moves from a plaza with a large Ferris wheel through an outdoor market with neon signs and stalls, then transitions to a street with abandoned vehicles and palm trees as the sun sets.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement park plaza with Ferris wheel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the Ferris wheel through an open plaza with scattered debris

entered.detail: large amusement park Ferris wheel with illuminated cabins
covered bus stop with blue roof and illuminated panel
multi-story concrete parking structure with horizontal lines
tall scaffolding structure with digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide plaza during golden hour, with a massive Ferris wheel dominating the center view. The camera moves forward past a bus shelter on the left, with a large parking garage visible in the distance. The area is relatively empty with clear skies and warm sunlight casting long shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor market with digital billboards and food stalls

events.description: turning left into the market area with food stalls and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area glancing at food stalls and digital displays

entered.detail: floating blue holographic advertisement with fish graphics
tall vertical screen displaying vehicle advertisements
covered vendor stalls with tables and chairs

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a semi-covered market area filled with food stalls and outdoor seating. A prominent holographic fish advertisement floats near the center, while large digital billboards display car ads. The Ferris wheel moves to the right background as the path winds through the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: market corridor with Brooklyn Barista and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: navigating through a crowd of NPCs near the coffee stall and market vendors

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing in the pathway near the barista stall

entered.detail: neon sign for Brooklyn Barista coffee shop with red lettering
large satellite dish mounted on a building roof
derelict vehicle with open doors parked near the market

segments.scene_description: Walking through a denser market corridor featuring the Brooklyn Barista coffee stall with its distinctive neon signage. NPCs gather and converse in the pathway, requiring navigation around them. The parking garage looms closer on the left while abandoned vehicles appear on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: street transition with abandoned vehicles and makeshift camp

events.description: exiting the market area onto the street with parked vehicles and makeshift tents
turning right to follow the road along the parking garage

agents.ego_description: walking past abandoned vehicles and a makeshift camp toward the main road

notable_agents.action: pedestrians standing near the makeshift camp tents

entered.detail: tarp-covered temporary shelters and camping equipment
line of palm trees along the street leading toward the waterfront
road barrier with striped pattern blocking vehicle access

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered market into an open street area featuring abandoned vehicles and a makeshift camp with tents. The camera turns right to follow the road, passing pedestrians near the camp. Palm trees line the street ahead while the Ferris wheel becomes visible again on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal road at sunset with palm trees and distant skyline

events.description: sun glare intensifies as the camera faces directly toward the setting sun

agents.ego_description: walking along the road toward the sunset with the Ferris wheel visible to the left

entered.detail: yellow illuminated sign reading CALIFORNIA on a building
contemporary glass and steel high-rise building
large angular metal art installation near the Ferris wheel

segments.scene_description: The final segment walks along an open coastal road directly facing the setting sun, creating intense lens flare and warm backlighting. The Ferris wheel appears again on the left near a geometric sculpture, while a yellow California sign glows on the right. Palm trees line the path as the camera moves toward the distant city skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sun-drenched plaza into a dense neon market before emerging onto a coastal road facing a setting sun. It begins by moving past a bus shelter toward a distant parking garage, with a massive Ferris wheel dominating the golden hour skyline. As the camera turns left, the open space shifts into a semi-covered market filled with holographic fish advertisements and digital billboards, eventually narrowing into a crowded corridor featuring the neon signage of the Brooklyn Barista stall. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the market, passing abandoned vehicles and a makeshift tent camp before turning right to follow a palm-lined street. Finally, the path leads directly into the intense lens flare of the sunset, passing a geometric sculpture and a glowing yellow California sign while moving toward the distant city skyline.
